publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Pseudocode; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Pseudocode: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Any informal paragraph counts as pseudocode even when two readers could execute different steps from it.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Useful pseudocode has unambiguous control flow and state effects that another person can trace and translate without inventing missing decisions.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Useful pseudocode has unambiguous control flow and state effects that another person can trace and translate without inventing missing decisions.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Pseudocode instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Useful pseudocode has unambiguous control flow and state effects that another person can trace and translate without inventing missing decisions.
Any informal paragraph counts as pseudocode even when two readers could execute different steps from it.

answer.explanation: Useful pseudocode has unambiguous control flow and state effects that another person can trace and translate without inventing missing decisions.
